Define reusable div.description: Define a named div for reuse

Reuse a div.description: Reuse the content of a previously defined div by ID

Reuse a div with heading shift.description: Reuse a div and shift heading levels

Reuse first N blocks of a div.description: Reuse only the first N top-level blocks of a div

Reuse a div with identifier remap.description: Reuse a div and rename element identifiers in the copied content
